calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2004 Off Calendar

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2004 Text Ruling

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-21-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Trinity Capital Corporation.
Declaration of E. Knowles in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: EVENORTH INTERNATIONAL INC., and EVENCIO GONZALES as follows:
Principal $43,753.13
Interest $2,975.20
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $382.50 for a total of $49,510.83.
Plaintiff is entitled to possession of the leased equipment listed in the Judgment, see scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
